nodes.context: Collection of Irish American gangs on New York City, Brooklyn, and Red Hook waterfronts from early 1900s to 1925, organized against Italian gangsters.
Sicilian extortion gangs that the White Hand Gang was named in response to.
Generic term for Italian organized crime groups that the White Hand Gang opposed.
Italian organized crime syndicate that took control of the waterfront after the White Hand Gang's demise.

edges.evidence_quote: Their name was chosen in response to the Sicilian Black Hand gangs
edges.context: The White Hand Gang named themselves in opposition to the Black Hand gangs.

edges.evidence_quote: organized against the growing influence of Italian gangsters
edges.context: The White Hand Gang organized to oppose Italian gangsters.

edges.evidence_quote: the Mafia completely controlled the waterfront
edges.context: The Mafia took over the waterfront after the White Hand Gang disappeared.
